scope.selection_note: Codex-only entity alias cleanup after identity196-dnm197-198. No provider-backed commands were run. Current validateRepo duplicate_global_identity output, canonical entity records, identity overrides, do-not-merge overrides, and identity186-198 review-note ids were inspected read-only.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch199-prep.json. No merges.json, do-not-merge.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical outputs, DB, or wiki files were edited.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_meeting-doc-133246-office-ada-compliance and entity_meeting-doc-164781-office-of-ada-compliance share identity key entity_office-of-ada-compliance.
source_evidence: Alias canonical record: display_name 'Office of ADA Compliance', entity_name 'Office of ADA Compliance', entity_type 'office', evidence meeting_doc_133246#p007_c0006 says the Office of ADA Compliance partnered with the Department of Subways on ADA Sensitivity Training.

Target canonical record: display_name 'entity_meeting_doc_164781_office_of_ada_compliance', entity_name 'Office of ADA Compliance', entity_type 'office', evidence meeting_doc_164781#p007_c0006 contains the same Office of ADA Compliance training context.
proposed_aliases.reason: Exact office identity with the same entity_name and same validator identity key; the target preserves the later meeting-doc surface while the alias is the cleaner display-name duplicate.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_meeting-doc-140491-pension-board-managers and entity_meeting-doc-174021-pension-board-of-managers share identity key entity_mta-defined-benefit-pension-plan-lirr-plan-for-additional-pensions-pension-board-of-managers.

proposed_aliases.reason: Exact board/committee identity; punctuation differences between slash and dash forms do not indicate separate entities.

proposed_aliases.reason: Exact MTA Procurement department identity; the alias is a single-source meeting-doc extraction that duplicates the established multi-source department record.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_meeting-doc-111756-nyct-cost-price-analysis and entity_nyct-cost-price-analysis-unit share identity key entity_nyc-transit-cost-price-analysis-unit.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_penn-station-127546 and entity_penn-station-131526 share identity key entity_penn-station.

proposed_aliases.reason: Exact station identity; both records name Penn Station and the target has broader source coverage.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_west-side-storage-yard-127546 and entity_west-side-yard-131526 share identity key entity_west-side-storage-yard.

proposed_aliases.reason: Exact facility identity; West Side Yard and West Side Storage Yard are represented as the same facility in the target display name and entity_name.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_mike-flynn-commissioner-nyc-dot and entity_nycdot-commissioner-mike-flynn share identity key entity_mike-flynn.

Target canonical record: display_name 'Mike Flynn, NYC DOT Commissioner', entity_name 'Mike Flynn', entity_type 'government_official', evidence fordham_rd_sedgwick_ave_bronx_river_pkwy_cb6_may2026#p002_c0002 names Commissioner Mike Flynn.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_meeting-doc-164901-peter-kohner and entity_peter-kohner-feb2024 share identity key entity_peter-kohner.
source_evidence: Alias canonical record: display_name 'entity_meeting_doc_164901_peter_kohner', entity_name 'Peter Kohner', entity_type 'person', evidence meeting_doc_164901#p006_c0006 names Peter Kohner, Senior Vice President, Infrastructure.

Target canonical record: display_name 'Peter Kohner, Senior Vice President of Infrastructure', entity_name 'Peter Kohner', entity_type 'person', evidence meeting_doc_133356#p006_c0004 names Peter Kohner, Senior Vice President of Infrastructure.
proposed_aliases.reason: Exact person identity with matching name and senior infrastructure role; the alias is a meeting-doc extraction of the same Peter Kohner record.

deferred.reason: Deferred generic Community Advisory Committee collisions because the same CAC label appears across distinct SBS corridor/project contexts; exact project scope needs relation/context review before aliasing.
Deferred boroughless community-board number collisions, including Community Board 1/4/5/7 examples where the validator key is shared but borough scope differs or is ambiguous.
Deferred initial-only person duplicates such as H. Mihaltses, P. Dietlin, M. Herbst, N. Zuckerman, S. Chu, and N. Brown; matching initials alone are not enough for this safe alias batch.
Deferred person clusters that appear to have a better existing root target outside the validator pair, such as David S. Mack or Lisette Camillo/Camilo variants, to avoid creating a side cluster.

Deferred broad program-label duplicates such as Vision Zero where source snippets may identify a logo or priority-corridor label rather than prove all records should collapse into one entity identity.

commands: jq inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
jq recursive extraction of entity ids from data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch186-prep.json through codex-identity-dnm-batch198-prep.json
bun --eval read-only validateRepo duplicate_global_identity mining over current canonical entity records
bun --eval read-only canonical record/evidence inspection for selected alias/target pairs
rg source-block checks for selected evidence literals
